{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374065570239890227","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很有趣！它就像一部时光机，带我穿梭到古代中国的各个朝代，看那些历史人物在舞台上的精彩表演。书里还揭秘了很多有趣的历史细节，像“秦国星耀智囊团为何多是外籍人士”，让我大开眼界。而且，它的语言诙谐幽默，就像是在和朋友聊天一样，一点也不枯燥。我觉得它很像《明朝那些事儿》，都能让我们在轻松的阅读中了解历史。推荐给喜欢历史的小伙伴们！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715655036,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我越来越爱你，可不能够给我个永远不分离。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3WZcyTwGGeJ7ZIe3pcWNZGwuaAlH/Dj/yUqAYty1k2f","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8fe739b01e23491e8e07cc1f48845ba2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531055&x-signature=v8hVdhY%2BL%2B7g00PRphQnseBQ3a4%3D","user_id":"3457331929288494","user_name":"找回遗失的自我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3457331929288494","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":"    秦国星耀智囊团为何多是商鞅、张仪等外籍人士？汉武帝如何赚钱又烧钱？隋炀帝南巡开凿了大运河，西巡时又干了什么？李渊何以凭借3万兵马7年定天下？战术天才李存勖吃了哪些战略短板的亏？王安石如何成为靖康之变的背锅侠？胡惟庸为何必须死？崇祯是如何远程“帮倒忙”的？袁世凯为何策划了清末“PS门”事件？
……
历史就是一出你方唱罢我方登场的戏剧，这些熟悉的名字背后，不仅有跌宕起伏的故事，也浓缩了每个时代承袭、变革和发展的偶然性与必然性。
本书是《国家人文历史》杂志公众号的精华结集，以时间为脉络，以“变化”为核心，精选制度、经济、军事、战略、朝堂5大主题、53个有戏又有料的话题，由点着面地纵向梳理了古代中国多个领域的承袭与变革，以动态的思维挖掘其背后的逻辑与本质，不仅还原了一个个鲜活多元的大时代，道出成败兴衰之理，更以诙谐的语言、独特的视角、严谨的考证，勾勒了今天中国的疆域版图、文化思想、经济格局、风俗人情和法度制度等多个领域的历史脉络。
细节决定成败，格局决定结局。翻开本书，读懂古代中国的承袭与变革，就能读懂中国几千年的风云流转，更能读懂中国何以传承至今，历久弥新。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"国家人文历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_name":"看不够的中国史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#802828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476023072277941310","read_count":"65","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280618"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"59","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182497&x-signature=VbYaI7or8AFqKIa0xdJLexeHYow%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16740,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":74},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512028157097296702","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值得反复观看的一本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749034418,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"给时间时间，让过去过去，让开始开始","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5UeGUuXQT8VcyGUAz+c+/faxW3hAB1CTApqQptDmE timestamp":1689679789,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"徜徉书海，感叹精神之无垠。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0sE7ulcldFK9Vy79P0bbVA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3589306448","user_name":"归去了无痕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3589306448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":" :{"base_info":{"description":"争取新书码到百万字！！！（绝不太监）〈码字ing〉","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwirSOh3RdrOvNjwq0/90wZ4cyOXSLR6NWiErD7gdrVH","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6509faff119424a8d3250538b582bb6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530576&x-signature=PITZDQmeVrO689bzNs050Vz9gsk%3D","user_id":"4002637444552574","user_name":"半江渔火"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4002637444552574","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_3","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.3","title_id":"author_level_3"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.3","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":" 历史就是一出你方唱罢我方登场的戏剧，这些熟悉的名字背后，不仅有跌宕起伏的故事，也浓缩了每个时代承袭、变革和发展的偶然性与必然性。
本书是《国家人文历史》杂志公众号的精华结集，以时间为脉络，以“变化”为核心，精选制度、经济、军事、战略、朝堂5大主题、53个有戏又有料的话题，由点着面地纵向梳理了古代中国多个领域的承袭与变革，以动态的思维挖掘其背后的逻辑与本质，不仅还原了一个个鲜活多元的大时代，道出成败兴衰之理，更以诙谐的语言、独特的视角、严谨的考证，勾勒了今天中国的疆域版图、文化思想、经济格局、风俗人情和法度制度等多个领域的历史脉络。
细节决定成败，格局决定结局。翻开本书，读懂古代中国的承袭与变革，就能读懂中国几千年的风云流转，更能读懂中国何以传承至今，历久弥新。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"国家人文历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_name":"看不够的中国史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#802828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476023072277941310","read_count":"65","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280618"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"59","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182497&x-signature=VbYaI7or8AFqKIa0xdJLexeHYow%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1203},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257114913323614995","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"中国是一个拥有悠久历史和丰富文化的国家，其历史跨越几千年之久，包含了许多著名的朝代、事件和人物。从这些朝代更替，和重要事情多发展过程中，我们能够学习到非常多的宝贵经验和道理。正所谓，学史使人明智。多看历史，去思考为什么明朝最后会被清朝所替代，为什么秦始皇能够统一六国。多思考这些问题，能够使我们更加聪颖。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689678866,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2wjFDKwz6FjZM0WorKTZrI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"439399553184717","user_name":"你好端端的登势"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"439399553184717","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":" timestamp":1689679122,"group_id":"7063025871128366093","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7p71vWe50R3J8ozODQ49YuNyS4eB+1aAIpH74GUpSrw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9832f8a95c844f2ebe4e65d500b5c481~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531239&x-signature=mraafjCvmESTHu2%2FXjaDK%2BgivRE%3D","user_id":"1726673307052110","user_name":"真的就再睡五分钟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1726673307052110","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_info":{"abstract":" 历史就是一出你方唱罢我方登场的戏剧，这些熟悉的名字背后，不仅有跌宕起伏的故事，也浓缩了每个时代承袭、变革和发展的偶然性与必然性。
本书是《国家人文历史》杂志公众号的精华结集，以时间为脉络，以“变化”为核心，精选制度、经济、军事、战略、朝堂5大主题、53个有戏又有料的话题，由点着面地纵向梳理了古代中国多个领域的承袭与变革，以动态的思维挖掘其背后的逻辑与本质，不仅还原了一个个鲜活多元的大时代，道出成败兴衰之理，更以诙谐的语言、独特的视角、严谨的考证，勾勒了今天中国的疆域版图、文化思想、经济格局、风俗人情和法度制度等多个领域的历史脉络。
细节决定成败，格局决定结局。翻开本书，读懂古代中国的承袭与变革，就能读懂中国几千年的风云流转，更能读懂中国何以传承至今，历久弥新。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"国家人文历史","author_id":"","book_id":"7063025871128366093","book_name":"看不够的中国史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#802828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476023072277941310","read_count":"65","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"280618"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"59","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b56adc2347f4566246af9d6f0df1f5fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182497&x-signature=VbYaI7or8AFqKIa0xdJLexeHYow%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"ignore_reader_info":{"chapter_data_list":[],"cur_item_order":0,"serial_count":0},"score_cnt":26}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"202603201721379EC9721061650B47DC25","message":"请求成功"}
